title: The First Chronological Scene of the Series
display_title: The First Chronological Scene of the Series
wikitext:
[]: The First Chronological Scene of the Series             Quote Post by Bankin' Stein » Sat Sep 21, 2013 2:45 am I'm just curious what the first chronological scene of the entire series is. If this has a definite answer, my mistake. But if there are only debatable answers, fire away!

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Sep 21, 2013 2:59 am Chronologically? Probably the flashback to Fuyutsuki's early days as a professor.

[]:             Quote Post by Bankin' Stein » Sat Sep 21, 2013 3:14 am Which scene though? The director's cut of episode 21, about five minutes in? Meaning the first line of the show comes from one of the faceless boys "Professor Fuyutski!" Maybe I'm freaking out but I have a feeling that can't be it.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Sep 21, 2013 3:49 am Not sure it counts or not, but I think the absolute earliest might be the instrumentality shot of Misato as a young girl who "has to be good and not bother Mommy". Depends how much time there was between the gendo/yui/fuyu college scenes and 2I, because Misato was definately a few years younger than she is in the ep21 flashback.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Sep 21, 2013 11:03 am It would be awesome to take every scene in NGE and arrange them chronologically. Start with Misato, go to Fuyutsuki with college Gendo and Yui... cutting straight from Naoko's monologue about Yui's absorption to Shinji crying at the train station... Hell, yeah. That would make for some powerful entertainment. Episode 21 would become very short, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Sep 21, 2013 11:21 am NemZ wrote: Not sure it counts or not, but I think the absolute earliest might be the instrumentality shot of Misato as a young girl who "has to be good and not bother Mommy". Depends how much time there was between the gendo/yui/fuyu college scenes and 2I, because Misato was definately a few years younger than she is in the ep21 flashback.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 21, 2013 12:10 pm Being 29 in '15, Misato would have been born in '86.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Sep 21, 2013 12:15 pm 29 my ass. Being older than she is makes me feel weird for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Falcon_of_the_Sun » Sat Sep 21, 2013 1:04 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: It would be awesome to take every scene in NGE and arrange them chronologically. Start with Misato, go to Fuyutsuki with college Gendo and Yui... cutting straight from Naoko's monologue about Yui's absorption to Shinji crying at the train station... Hell, yeah. That would make for some powerful entertainment. Episode 21 would become very short, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Bankin' Stein » Sat Sep 21, 2013 2:03 pm Bon diggity. I look forward to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 30, 2013 10:39 pm Same here. I'd love to see character interactions in order, but Angels/Impacts are interesting too.

[]:             Quote Post by Violet Shadow » Sun Oct 20, 2013 4:51 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Angels/Impacts are interesting too.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Oct 20, 2013 9:54 pm Violet Shadow wrote: useless Jet Alone episode

[]:             Quote Post by Noah » Sun Oct 20, 2013 10:48 pm Falcon_of_the_Sun wrote: Kinda working on that, although I am focusing on the stuff regarding Angels, Impacts and so on.

[]:             Quote Post by Violet Shadow » Mon Oct 21, 2013 12:36 am Chuckman wrote: How dare you!
